postBuildHooks.darwin/*: sh -c "ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); BIN='${bin}'; if [ -n \"$BIN\" ] && [ \"$BIN\" != '\${bin}' ]; then DEST=\"$BIN.app/Contents/Resources\"; else DEST=\"$ROOT/wails-ui/workset/build/bin/workset.app/Contents/Resources\"; fi; cp \"$ROOT/wails-ui/workset/build/updater/workset-updater\" \"$DEST/workset-updater\""
